name: restaurant managers at small to medium-sized restaurants processing 10-50 employee shifts per week tool
description: For restaurant managers at small to medium-sized restaurants processing 10-50 employee shifts per week, inefficient scheduling causes employee dissatisfaction and scheduling conflicts. We automate shift rotations instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets or paper.
target_audience: restaurant managers at small to medium-sized restaurants processing 10-50 employee shifts per week
problem_solved: inefficient scheduling and time off management
